creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
----------  Forwarded Message  ----------

Subject: Re: misc/142335: Download of Release 8.0 LIVE is NOT a "live" from CD 
program.
Date: Wednesday 03 March 2010
From: Diana Allen <smokepole32@yahoo.com>
To: Bruce Cran <bruce@cran.org.uk>

The installer INSISTS on partitioning the HD BEFORE proceeding!  THIS does NOT 
constitute an "acceptable" "live" CD program from MY point of view!
